bargaining_unit_name: Trenton Fire Officers Association, Firemen's Mutual Benevolent Association Local 206
binding_arbitration_statute: New Jersey Employer-Employee Relations Act (N.J.S.A. 34:13A-1 et seq., Ch. 13A)
total_comp_note: Located by browsing the NJ PERC public-sector-contracts index directly by employer name (StartKey=Trenton), not generic web search. Full CBA, City of Trenton and Trenton Fire Officers Association/FMBA Local 206. Overlaps the already-ingested Trenton non-safety row (nj_trenton_other_2019, 2019-2023) for 2021-2023, and overlaps the Trenton police row ingested this session (2019-2024) for 2021-2024 -- with all three Trenton rows (police, fire, non-safety) pairwise overlapping in 2021-2023, this is a genuine three-way matched design, the strongest PA/NJ result to date.
